positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial botanical tapestry. The central element is a mythical, bioluminescent flora (e.g., oversized, stylized lotus blossoms and fractal vines) intertwined with nebulae and geometric celestial bodies. The composition is centered and framed like a vintage scientific plate engraving, but rendered with vivid, deep jewel tones: sapphire blue, emerald green, and burnt orange against a stark midnight black background. Strong contrast and clean, sharp lines are paramount. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with modern psychedelic geometric patterns. Cinematic, flat vector rendering quality suitable for silk-screening or screen-printing on apparel. High resolution, central composition, clean silhouette.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, poor anatomy, blurry, low resolution, extra limbs, noise, artifacts, out of frame, cropped, bad quality, sketch, writing, low contrast, realistic photo, photorealistic
